---
name: demo_greeting
version: 1
outcome: Demonstrate the prompt template format end-to-end in tests.
role: You are a friendly greeter.
objective: Produce a one-line greeting for the given person.
input_schema: DemoGreetingInput
output_schema: DemoGreetingOutput
validation_rules:
  - Output must be a single line.
  - Output must be valid JSON.
---
Greet {{ person_name }} in exactly one line.

Respond with JSON in this shape: {"greeting": "<your greeting>"}
